parameters.query:
SELECT id, slug, config, active
FROM caiac.clients
WHERE slug = '{{ $('Receive Signin Request').item.json.body.slug }}'
LIMIT 1

SELECT id, email, name, role, active,
       (password_hash = crypt('{{ $('Receive Signin Request').item.json.body.password }}', password_hash)) as password_valid
FROM caiac.users
WHERE email = '{{ $('Receive Signin Request').item.json.body.email }}'
AND client_id = '{{ $('Postgres (Look up client)').item.json.id }}'
LIMIT 1

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ token: $('Generate JWT').item.json.token, expires_at: $('Store Session').item.json.expires_at, user: { id: $('Validate Credentials').item.json.user_id, email: $('Validate Credentials').item.json.email, name: $('Validate Credentials').item.json.name, role: $('Validate Credentials').item.json.role, client_id: $('Validate Credentials').item.json.client_id }, config: $('Validate Credentials').item.json.config }) }}

parameters.query:
SELECT encode(
  hmac(
    concat(
      '{{ $('Validate Credentials').item.json.user_id }}',
      '.',
      '{{ $('Validate Credentials').item.json.role }}',
      '.',
      extract(epoch from now())::bigint::text
    ),
    '{{ $('Validate Credentials').item.json.jwt_secret }}',
    'sha256'
  ),
  'hex'
) as token

INSERT INTO caiac.sessions (token, user_id, client_id, role, expires_at)
VALUES (
    '{{ $('Generate JWT').item.json.token }}',
    '{{ $('Validate Credentials').item.json.user_id }}',
    '{{ $('Validate Credentials').item.json.client_id }}',
    '{{ $('Validate Credentials').item.json.role }}',
    NOW() + INTERVAL '8 hours'
)
RETURNING id, token, expires_at;

SELECT webhook_secret
FROM caiac.clients
WHERE slug = '{{ $json.body.slug }}'
LIMIT 1

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ timestamp: $('Receive Signin Request').item.json.headers['x-caiac-timestamp'], signature: $('Receive Signin Request').item.json.headers['x-caiac-signature'], signing_key: $('Receive Signin Request').item.json.body.email, secret: $input.first().json.webhook_secret }) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO caiac.audit_log (client_id, user_id, action, detail, ip_address)
VALUES (
    '{{ $('Validate Credentials').item.json.client_id }}',
    '{{ $('Validate Credentials').item.json.user_id }}',
    'signin',
    '{"role": "{{ $('Validate Credentials').item.json.role }}", "email": "{{ $('Validate Credentials').item.json.email }}"}',
    '{{ $('Receive Signin Request').item.json.headers['x-forwarded-for'] ?? $('Receive Signin Request').item.json.headers['host'] }}'
)
RETURNING id, created_at;

FROM caiac.clients

LIMIT 1
